siteSettings.tagline: Industrial shutdown support, fabrication, and maintenance

hero.heading: Reliable teams for plant maintenance and shutdown delivery

services.title: Mechanical Maintenance

services.title: Fabrication & Install
services.description: Workshop and onsite fabrication, fit-out, and installation support.

projects.name: Kiln Rebuild Program
projects.summary: Executed a staged kiln rebuild across two outage windows with zero LTIs.

projects.name: Conveyor Upgrade
projects.summary: Delivered conveyor structure modifications and commissioning support.

projects.name: Tank Farm Maintenance
projects.summary: Performed preventive maintenance and compliance rectifications across the tank farm.
